// Code generated by simplemock. DO NOT EDIT.
package main

import (
	"io"
)

var _ ReadWriter = &ReadWriterMock{}

type ReadWriterMock struct {
	ReadFunc func(p []byte) (n int, err error)
	WriteFunc func(p []byte) (n int, err error)
}

func (m *ReadWriterMock) Read(p []byte) (n int, err error) {
	if m.ReadFunc != nil {
		return m.ReadFunc(p)
	}
	panic("Read called with nil ReadFunc!")
}

func (m *ReadWriterMock) Write(p []byte) (n int, err error) {
	if m.WriteFunc != nil {
		return m.WriteFunc(p)
	}
	panic("Write called with nil WriteFunc!")
}
